nodes.name: 📅 Sunday 10 AM PHT
nodes.notes:
Fires every Sunday at 10:00 AM PHT.
Gives you the morning to review the compilation before it publishes.

nodes.name: 📊 Read Week's Analytics
nodes.notes: Reads all rows from Analytics sheet. The next node filters to the current week and sorts by performance.

nodes.name: 🏆 Get Top 5 of the Week
nodes.notes:
Filters Analytics data to the last 7 days, sorts by Total Views,
and selects the top 5 performing videos.
Sets compilation_ready = true if at least 3 videos exist (min for a compilation).

nodes.name: 🔀 Enough Videos?
nodes.notes:
Only proceeds if there are at least 3 videos to compile.
If not, sends a skip notification instead.

values.content:
You are a YouTube SEO expert for gaming compilation content. You will receive a list of the week's top-performing short-form Roblox videos. Generate optimized metadata for a YouTube long-form compilation video (3-5 minutes) that combines these shorts.

Output strictly in JSON:
{
  "yt_title": "Clickbait-style YouTube title, max 100 chars, include emoji, mention 'Best Roblox Moments' or similar",
  "yt_description": "SEO-rich description, 3-4 paragraphs, include timestamps placeholder, relevant keywords, call to subscribe",
  "yt_tags": ["tag1", "tag2", "...up to 15 tags"],
  "thumbnail_text": "Bold text overlay for the thumbnail (max 5 words)",
  "thumbnail_prompt": "Detailed image generation prompt for a 16:9 YouTube thumbnail — vibrant, high contrast, large text, dramatic Roblox scene",
  "video_order": ["file_code_name_1", "file_code_name_2", "..."],
  "transition_style": "Recommended transition style between clips (e.g., zoom blur, glitch, whip pan)",
  "intro_text": "5-second intro text overlay for the compilation"
}

nodes.name: 🧠 Generate Compilation Metadata
nodes.notes:
Generates YouTube long-form metadata: title, description, tags, thumbnail prompt,
optimal video ordering, transition style, and intro text.
Orders videos for retention: strongest open, weakest middle, strong close.

nodes.name: 📋 Prepare Compilation Data
nodes.notes:
Prepares all data for the compilation:
- FFmpeg concat file content (video ordering)
- Timestamps for the description
- Compilation filename
- All metadata from OpenAI

nodes.name: 📱 Send Compilation Brief
nodes.notes:
Sends the full compilation brief including video order, FFmpeg command,
thumbnail prompt, YouTube metadata, and timestamps.
You manually compile in CapCut and upload — full automation in Phase 5.

nodes.name: 📊 Log Compilation to Tracker
nodes.notes:
Logs the compilation as a new row in the Content Tracker with Status 'Compilation'.
This helps track both short-form and long-form content in one place.

parameters.text:
=⏩ *COMPILATION SKIPPED*
📅 {{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd') }}

Not enough videos this week (need at least 3).
Keep posting shorts — compilation will auto-generate next Sunday when you have enough data!

nodes.name: 📱 Skip Notification
nodes.notes: Notifies you that the compilation was skipped because fewer than 3 videos were published this week.
